name: dd-codex
description: Drop the OS clipboard (text or image) into Codex context and act on it — no pasting, no boilerplate. Triggers: /dd, /ㅇㅇ (Hangul IME alias), 클립보드 보내줘, 이거 분석해줘, 방금 캡처한 거, 이 레퍼런스로, 스크린샷 드롭, drop clipboard, use what I copied, this screenshot, this reference.

interface.shortDescription: Drop the OS clipboard into Codex context and act on it instantly
interface.longDescription: Captures the current OS clipboard (text or image) into a local cache and injects only a manifest summary into context — no raw paste, no bloat. Works for screenshots, error logs, code snippets, design references, and URLs. Invoke as /dd or /ㅇㅇ (Korean IME alias). Handles large captures by routing to a sub-agent, keeping the main conversation clean.
defaultPrompt: Drop my clipboard and tell me what it is.
Use what I just copied as the reference for my current task.
방금 복사한 에러 로그 보고 원인 찾아줘
